texts.title: 咖啡店的小故事
texts.description: Short reading sample for sentence-by-sentence review.

lines.hanzi: 今天我去一家安静的咖啡店。
lines.pinyin: jin tian wo qu yi jia an jing de ka fei dian
lines.translation: Today I went to a quiet cafe.

lines.hanzi: 我一边听音乐，一边看中文书。
lines.pinyin: wo yi bian ting yin yue, yi bian kan zhong wen shu
lines.translation: I listened to music while reading a Chinese book.

lines.hanzi: 如果我不懂一个词，我就记下来做成卡片。
lines.pinyin: ru guo wo bu dong yi ge ci, wo jiu ji xia lai zuo cheng ka pian
lines.translation: If I do not understand a word, I write it down and turn it into a card.

texts.title: 月亮代表我的心
texts.description: Sample lyric excerpt. Replace or extend this with your own song text.

lines.hanzi: 你问我爱你有多深
lines.pinyin: ni wen wo ai ni you duo shen
lines.translation: You ask me how deep my love for you is

lines.hanzi: 我爱你有几分
lines.pinyin: wo ai ni you ji fen
lines.translation: How much I love you

lines.hanzi: 我的情也真
lines.pinyin: wo de qing ye zhen
lines.translation: My feelings are true too

lines.hanzi: 我的爱也真
lines.pinyin: wo de ai ye zhen
lines.translation: My love is true as well

texts.title: 欠父亲的话
texts.description: Lyric entry with accurate pinyin and faithful translation.

lines.hanzi: 現在才聽懂 你的冷漠是言不由衷
lines.pinyin: xian zai cai ting dong ni de leng mo shi yan bu you zhong
lines.translation: Only now do I understand your coldness was not what you truly meant

lines.hanzi: 是不是最偉大的愛 都安靜無聲
lines.pinyin: shi bu shi zui wei da de ai dou an jing wu sheng
lines.translation: Is it that the greatest love is always silent

lines.hanzi: 偷嘗你的煙 卻沒嘗過你的苦
lines.pinyin: tou chang ni de yan que mei chang guo ni de ku
lines.translation: I secretly tried your cigarettes, but never tasted your hardships

lines.hanzi: 根本沒想過感受 你喜怒哀愁
lines.pinyin: gen ben mei xiang guo gan shou ni xi nu ai chou
lines.translation: I never truly thought about your feelings—your joy, anger, sorrow, and worries

lines.hanzi: 稜角磨平後 他們說我越來越像你
lines.pinyin: leng jiao mo ping hou ta men shuo wo yue lai yue xiang ni
lines.translation: After my rough edges were worn down, they say I’ve become more like you

lines.hanzi: 那個最倔強的脾氣 你略勝一籌
lines.pinyin: na ge zui jue jiang de pi qi ni lue sheng yi chou
lines.translation: But when it comes to stubbornness, you still surpass me

lines.hanzi: 時間不能靜止停留 讓歲月回頭
lines.pinyin: shi jian bu neng jing zhi ting liu rang sui yue hui tou
lines.translation: Time cannot stop or turn the years back

lines.hanzi: 不會去等 我變成熟
lines.pinyin: bu hui qu deng wo bian cheng shu
lines.translation: It won’t wait for me to grow mature

lines.hanzi: 忘了從甚麼時候
lines.pinyin: wang le cong shen me shi hou
lines.translation: I’ve forgotten since when

lines.hanzi: 分離開始比相聚要久
lines.pinyin: fen li kai shi bi xiang ju yao jiu
lines.translation: Being apart has lasted longer than being together

lines.hanzi: 所以能好好問候 不要等
lines.pinyin: suo yi neng hao hao wen hou bu yao deng
lines.translation: So if you can check in, don’t wait

lines.hanzi: 只能靠思念解憂
lines.pinyin: zhi neng kao si nian jie you
lines.translation: Otherwise, only longing can ease the sorrow

lines.hanzi: 閉上眼睛回味 能想到的回憶很舊
lines.pinyin: bi shang yan jing hui wei neng xiang dao de hui yi hen jiu
lines.translation: Closing my eyes to reminisce, the memories that come are already old

lines.hanzi: 從小時候 到長大以後
lines.pinyin: cong xiao shi hou dao zhang da yi hou
lines.translation: From childhood to adulthood

lines.hanzi: 人生有太多路口
lines.pinyin: ren sheng you tai duo lu kou
lines.translation: Life has too many crossroads

lines.hanzi: 太多的人忘了看身後
lines.pinyin: tai duo de ren wang le kan shen hou
lines.translation: Too many people forget to look back

lines.hanzi: 開始所有的淚流
lines.pinyin: kai shi suo you de lei liu
lines.translation: And all the tears begin to flow

lines.hanzi: 不會再 為疼痛只為內疚
lines.pinyin: bu hui zai wei teng tong zhi wei nei jiu
lines.translation: No longer just for pain, but for guilt

lines.hanzi: 聞著熟悉煙味在空中漂浮很久
lines.pinyin: wen zhe shu xi yan wei zai kong zhong piao fu hen jiu
lines.translation: The familiar smell of smoke lingers in the air for a long time

lines.hanzi: 所有的虧欠 真的對不起
lines.pinyin: suo you de kui qian zhen de dui bu qi
lines.translation: For everything I owe you, I’m truly sorry

lines.hanzi: 再也來不及
lines.pinyin: zai ye lai bu ji
lines.translation: It’s too late now

lines.hanzi: 爸我好想你
lines.pinyin: ba wo hao xiang ni
lines.translation: Dad, I miss you so much

texts.title: 南方姑娘
texts.description: Lyric entry with pinyin and English translation.

lines.hanzi: 北方的村莊住著一個南方的姑娘
lines.pinyin: bei fang de cun zhuang zhu zhe yi ge nan fang de gu niang
lines.translation: In a northern village lives a girl from the south

lines.hanzi: 她總是喜歡穿著帶花的裙子站在路旁
lines.pinyin: ta zong shi xi huan chuan zhe dai hua de qun zi zhan zai lu pang
lines.translation: She always likes to stand by the roadside in a floral dress

lines.hanzi: 她的話不多 但笑起來是那麼平靜優雅
lines.pinyin: ta de hua bu duo dan xiao qi lai shi na me ping jing you ya
lines.translation: She doesn’t speak much, but her smile is so calm and graceful

lines.hanzi: 她柔弱的眼神裡裝的是什麼? 是思念的憂傷
lines.pinyin: ta rou ruo de yan shen li zhuang de shi shen me shi si nian de you shang
lines.translation: What is held in her gentle eyes? It is the sorrow of longing

lines.hanzi: 南方的小鎮 陰雨的冬天沒有北方冷
lines.pinyin: nan fang de xiao zhen yin yu de dong tian mei you bei fang leng
lines.translation: In southern towns, the rainy winters are not as cold as in the north

lines.hanzi: 她不需要臃腫的棉衣去遮蓋她似水的面容
lines.pinyin: ta bu xu yao yong zhong de mian yi qu zhe gai ta si shui de mian rong
lines.translation: She doesn’t need heavy padded clothes to cover her water-like face

lines.hanzi: 她在來去的街頭留下影子 芳香在回眸人的心頭
lines.pinyin: ta zai lai qu de jie tou liu xia ying zi fang xiang zai hui mou ren de xin tou
lines.translation: She leaves her shadow in the passing streets, her fragrance lingering in hearts that look back

lines.hanzi: 眨眼的時間 芳香已飄散 影子已不見
lines.pinyin: zha yan de shi jian fang xiang yi piao san ying zi yi bu jian
lines.translation: In the blink of an eye, the fragrance has drifted away and her shadow is gone

lines.hanzi: 南方姑娘 你是否習慣北方的秋涼?
lines.pinyin: nan fang gu niang ni shi fou xi guan bei fang de qiu liang
lines.translation: Southern girl, have you gotten used to the cool autumn of the north?

lines.hanzi: 南方姑娘 你是否喜歡北方人的直爽?
lines.pinyin: nan fang gu niang ni shi fou xi huan bei fang ren de zhi shuang
lines.translation: Southern girl, do you like the straightforwardness of northern people?

lines.hanzi: 日子過的就像那些不眠的晚上
lines.pinyin: ri zi guo de jiu xiang na xie bu mian de wan shang
lines.translation: Days pass like those sleepless nights

lines.hanzi: 她嚼著口香糖 對牆滿談著理想 耶
lines.pinyin: ta jiao zhe kou xiang tang dui qiang man tan zhe li xiang ye
lines.translation: She chews gum, talking endlessly to the wall about her dreams, yeah

lines.hanzi: 南方姑娘 我們都在忍受著漫長
lines.pinyin: nan fang gu niang wo men dou zai ren shou zhe man chang
lines.translation: Southern girl, we are all enduring the long stretch of time

lines.hanzi: 南方姑娘 是不是高樓遮住了你的希望? 誒嘿
lines.pinyin: nan fang gu niang shi bu shi gao lou zhe zhu le ni de xi wang ei hei
lines.translation: Southern girl, have the tall buildings blocked your hopes?

lines.hanzi: 昨日的雨曾淋漓過她瘦弱的肩膀
lines.pinyin: zuo ri de yu ceng lin li guo ta shou ruo de jian bang
lines.translation: Yesterday’s rain once drenched her frail shoulders

lines.hanzi: 夜空的北斗也沒有讓她找到迷途的方向
lines.pinyin: ye kong de bei dou ye mei you rang ta zhao dao mi tu de fang xiang
lines.translation: Even the Big Dipper in the night sky couldn’t guide her lost way

lines.hanzi: 陽光裡 她在院子中央晾曬著衣裳
lines.pinyin: yang guang li ta zai yuan zi zhong yang liang shai zhe yi shang
lines.translation: In the sunlight, she hangs clothes out to dry in the middle of the yard

lines.hanzi: 在四季的風中 她散著頭髮安慰著時光
lines.pinyin: zai si ji de feng zhong ta san zhe tou fa an wei zhe shi guang
lines.translation: In the winds of all seasons, her loose hair seems to comfort time itself

lines.hanzi: 南方姑娘 你是否愛上了北方?
lines.pinyin: nan fang gu niang ni shi fou ai shang le bei fang
lines.translation: Southern girl, have you fallen in love with the north?

lines.hanzi: 南方姑娘 你說今天你就要回到你的家鄉?
lines.pinyin: nan fang gu niang ni shuo jin tian ni jiu yao hui dao ni de jia xiang
lines.translation: Southern girl, you said you’re going back to your hometown today?

lines.hanzi: 思念讓人心傷 她呼喚著你的淚光
lines.pinyin: si nian rang ren xin shang ta hu huan zhe ni de lei guang
lines.translation: Longing breaks the heart, calling out the tears in your eyes

lines.hanzi: 南方的果子已熟 那是最簡單的理想 耶嘿
lines.pinyin: nan fang de guo zi yi shu na shi zui jian dan de li xiang ye hei
lines.translation: The fruits in the south are ripe—that is the simplest dream, yeah hey

lines.hanzi: 南方
lines.pinyin: nan fang
lines.translation: The south

texts.title: 回到過去
texts.description: Jay Chou - Hui dao guo qu

lines.hanzi: 一盞黃黃舊舊的燈 時間在旁悶不吭聲
lines.pinyin: yi zhan huang huang jiu jiu de deng shi jian zai pang men bu keng sheng
lines.translation: A dim, old yellow lamp, while time stays silent beside it

lines.hanzi: 寂寞下手毫無分寸 不懂得輕重之分
lines.pinyin: ji mo xia shou hao wu fen cun bu dong de qing zhong zhi fen
lines.translation: Loneliness strikes without restraint, not knowing any sense of measure

lines.hanzi: 沉默支撐躍過陌生 靜靜看著凌晨黃昏
lines.pinyin: chen mo zhi cheng yue guo mo sheng jing jing kan zhe ling chen huang hun
lines.translation: Silence supports me as I leap over unfamiliarity, quietly watching dawn and dusk

lines.hanzi: 妳的身影 失去平衡 慢慢下沉
lines.pinyin: ni de shen ying shi qu ping heng man man xia chen
lines.translation: Your silhouette loses balance and slowly sinks

lines.hanzi: 黑暗已在空中盤旋 該往哪我看不見
lines.pinyin: hei an yi zai kong zhong pan xuan gai wang na wo kan bu jian
lines.translation: Darkness circles in the air; I can’t see where to go

lines.hanzi: 也許愛在夢的另一端
lines.pinyin: ye xu ai zai meng de ling yi duan
lines.translation: Maybe love exists on the other side of dreams

lines.hanzi: 無法存活在真實的空間
lines.pinyin: wu fa cun huo zai zhen shi de kong jian
lines.translation: Unable to survive in the real world

lines.hanzi: 想回到過去 試著抱妳在懷裡
lines.pinyin: xiang hui dao guo qu shi zhe bao ni zai huai li
lines.translation: I want to return to the past, try to hold you in my arms

lines.hanzi: 羞怯的臉帶有一點稚氣
lines.pinyin: xiu qie de lian dai you yi dian zhi qi
lines.translation: Your shy face still carrying a bit of innocence

lines.hanzi: 想看妳看的世界，想在妳夢的畫面
lines.pinyin: xiang kan ni kan de shi jie xiang zai ni meng de hua mian
lines.translation: I want to see the world you see, to be inside your dream scenes

lines.hanzi: 只要靠在一起就能感覺甜蜜
lines.pinyin: zhi yao kao zai yi qi jiu neng gan jue tian mi
lines.translation: Just being close together is enough to feel sweetness

lines.hanzi: 想回到過去 試著讓故事繼續
lines.pinyin: xiang hui dao guo qu shi zhe rang gu shi ji xu
lines.translation: I want to return to the past and try to let the story continue

lines.hanzi: 至少不再讓妳離我而去
lines.pinyin: zhi shao bu zai rang ni li wo er qu
lines.translation: At least I wouldn’t let you leave me again

lines.hanzi: 分散時間的注意 這次會抱得更緊
lines.pinyin: fen san shi jian de zhu yi zhe ci hui bao de geng jin
lines.translation: I’ll distract time this time, and hold you even tighter

lines.hanzi: 這樣挽留不知還來不來得及 想回到過去
lines.pinyin: zhe yang wan liu bu zhi hai lai bu lai de ji xiang hui dao guo qu
lines.translation: I don’t know if holding on like this is still in time—I want to go back to the past

lines.hanzi: 思緒不斷阻擋著回憶播放
lines.pinyin: si xu bu duan zu dang zhe hui yi bo fang
lines.translation: My thoughts keep blocking the replay of memories

lines.hanzi: 盲目的追尋仍然空空盪盪
lines.pinyin: mang mu de zhui xun reng ran kong kong dang dang
lines.translation: Blind searching still leaves me empty

lines.hanzi: 灰濛濛的夜晚睡意又不知躲到哪去
lines.pinyin: hui meng meng de ye wan shui yi you bu zhi duo dao na qu
lines.translation: On this dim night, sleep has nowhere to be found

lines.hanzi: 一轉身孤單已躺在身旁
lines.pinyin: yi zhuan shen gu dan yi tang zai shen pang
lines.translation: As I turn around, loneliness is already lying beside me

lines.hanzi: 沉默支撐躍過陌生 靜靜看著凌晨黃昏
lines.pinyin: chen mo zhi cheng yue guo mo sheng jing jing kan zhe ling chen huang hun
lines.translation: Silence supports me as I cross the unfamiliar, quietly watching dawn and dusk

lines.hanzi: 妳的身影 失去平衡 慢慢下沉
lines.pinyin: ni de shen ying shi qu ping heng man man xia chen
lines.translation: Your silhouette loses balance and slowly sinks

lines.hanzi: 想回到過去
lines.pinyin: xiang hui dao guo qu
lines.translation: I want to go back to the past

texts.title: 蒲公英的約定
texts.description: Jay Chou - Pu gong ying de yue ding

lines.hanzi: 小學籬笆旁的蒲公英
lines.pinyin: xiao xue li ba pang de pu gong ying
lines.translation: The dandelions by the fence at primary school

lines.hanzi: 是記憶裡有味道的風景
lines.pinyin: shi ji yi li you wei dao de feng jing
lines.translation: Are a landscape in memory filled with a certain scent

lines.hanzi: 午睡操場傳來蟬的聲音
lines.pinyin: wu shui cao chang chuan lai chan de sheng yin
lines.translation: From the playground at naptime comes the sound of cicadas

lines.hanzi: 多少年後也還是很好聽
lines.pinyin: duo shao nian hou ye hai shi hen hao ting
lines.translation: Even many years later, it still sounds beautiful

lines.hanzi: 將願望折紙飛機寄成信
lines.pinyin: jiang yuan wang zhe zhi fei ji ji cheng xin
lines.translation: Folding wishes into paper planes and sending them like letters

lines.hanzi: 因為我們等不到那流星
lines.pinyin: yin wei wo men deng bu dao na liu xing
lines.translation: Because we couldn’t wait for that shooting star

lines.hanzi: 認真投決定命運的硬幣
lines.pinyin: ren zhen tou jue ding ming yun de ying bi
lines.translation: Seriously tossing a coin to decide our fate

lines.hanzi: 卻不知道到底能去哪裡
lines.pinyin: que bu zhi dao dao di neng qu na li
lines.translation: Yet not knowing where it would actually take us

lines.hanzi: 一起長大的約定 那樣清晰 打過勾的我相信
lines.pinyin: yi qi zhang da de yue ding na yang qing xi da guo gou de wo xiang xin
lines.translation: The promise we made growing up together was so clear—I believed in it once we checked it off

lines.hanzi: 說好要一起旅行 是妳如今 唯一堅持的任性
lines.pinyin: shuo hao yao yi qi lv xing shi ni ru jin wei yi jian chi de ren xing
lines.translation: We said we’d travel together—that’s now your only stubborn insistence

lines.hanzi: 在走廊上罰站打手心 我們卻注意窗邊的蜻蜓
lines.pinyin: zai zou lang shang fa zhan da shou xin wo men que zhu yi chuang bian de qing ting
lines.translation: Standing punished in the hallway, we paid more attention to the dragonflies by the window

lines.hanzi: 我去到哪裡妳都跟很緊 很多的夢在等待著進行
lines.pinyin: wo qu dao na li ni dou gen hen jin hen duo de meng zai deng dai zhe jin xing
lines.translation: Wherever I went, you followed closely—so many dreams were waiting to unfold

lines.hanzi: 一起長大的約定 那樣清晰 打過勾的我相信
lines.pinyin: yi qi zhang da de yue ding na yang qing xi da guo gou de wo xiang xin
lines.translation: The promise we made growing up together was so clear—I believed in it once we checked it off

lines.hanzi: 說好要一起旅行 是妳如今 唯一堅持的任性
lines.pinyin: shuo hao yao yi qi lv xing shi ni ru jin wei yi jian chi de ren xing
lines.translation: We said we’d travel together—that’s now your only stubborn insistence

lines.hanzi: 一起長大的約定 那樣真心 與妳聊不完的曾經
lines.pinyin: yi qi zhang da de yue ding na yang zhen xin yu ni liao bu wan de ceng jing
lines.translation: The promise we made growing up together was so sincere—with endless memories to talk about with you

lines.hanzi: 而我已經分不清 妳是友情 還是錯過的愛情
lines.pinyin: er wo yi jing fen bu qing ni shi you qing hai shi cuo guo de ai qing
lines.translation: And now I can’t tell whether you are friendship, or a love that slipped away

lines.hanzi: 长亭外
lines.pinyin: chang ting wai
lines.translation: Outside the long pavilion

lines.hanzi: 古道边
lines.pinyin: gu dao bian
lines.translation: Beside the ancient road

lines.hanzi: 芳草碧连天
lines.pinyin: fang cao bi lian tian
lines.translation: Fragrant green grass stretches to the horizon

lines.hanzi: 晚风拂柳笛声残
lines.pinyin: wan feng fu liu di sheng can
lines.translation: The evening breeze brushes willows, as the flute’s sound fades

lines.hanzi: 夕阳山外山
lines.pinyin: xi yang shan wai shan
lines.translation: Beyond the mountains, the setting sun sinks

lines.hanzi: 天之涯
lines.pinyin: tian zhi ya
lines.translation: At the edge of the sky

lines.hanzi: 地之角
lines.pinyin: di zhi jiao
lines.translation: At the corner of the earth

lines.hanzi: 知交半零落
lines.pinyin: zhi jiao ban ling luo
lines.translation: Half of my dear friends have drifted apart

lines.hanzi: 一壶浊酒尽余欢
lines.pinyin: yi hu zhuo jiu jin yu huan
lines.translation: A pot of humble wine drains what little joy remains

lines.hanzi: 今宵别梦寒
lines.pinyin: jin xiao bie meng han
lines.translation: Tonight, parting dreams feel cold

lines.hanzi: 情千缕 酒一杯 声声喋喋催
lines.pinyin: qing qian lü jiu yi bei sheng sheng die die cui
lines.translation: A thousand threads of feeling, a cup of wine, words urging again and again

lines.hanzi: 问君此去几时还
lines.pinyin: wen jun ci qu ji shi huan
lines.translation: I ask you, when will you return from this journey?

lines.hanzi: 来时莫徘徊
lines.pinyin: lai shi mo pai huai
lines.translation: When you return, do not linger

lines.hanzi: 是有過幾個不錯對象 說起來並不寂寞孤單
lines.pinyin: shi you guo ji ge bu cuo dui xiang shuo qi lai bing bu ji mo gu dan
lines.translation: There were a few good partners before, so I can’t say I’ve been lonely

lines.hanzi: 可能我浪蕩 讓人家不安 才會結果都陣亡
lines.pinyin: ke neng wo lang dang rang ren jia bu an cai hui jie guo dou zhen wang
lines.translation: Maybe I was too carefree and made people uneasy—that’s why they all ended badly

lines.hanzi: 我沒有什麼陰影魔障 妳千萬不要放在心上
lines.pinyin: wo mei you shen me yin ying mo zhang ni qian wan bu yao fang zai xin shang
lines.translation: I don’t have any dark baggage, so please don’t take it to heart

lines.hanzi: 我又不脆弱 何況那算什麼傷 反正愛情不就都這樣
lines.pinyin: wo you bu cui ruo he kuang na suan shen me shang fan zheng ai qing bu jiu dou zhe yang
lines.translation: I’m not fragile anyway, and that barely counts as hurt—love is always like this, isn’t it

lines.hanzi: 我沒有說謊 我何必說謊
lines.pinyin: wo mei you shuo huang wo he bi shuo huang
lines.translation: I’m not lying—why would I lie?

lines.hanzi: 妳懂我的 我對妳從來就不會假裝
lines.pinyin: ni dong wo de wo dui ni cong lai jiu bu hui jia zhuang
lines.translation: You understand me—I’ve never pretended with you

lines.hanzi: 我哪有說謊 請別以為妳有多難忘
lines.pinyin: wo na you shuo huang qing bie yi wei ni you duo nan wang
lines.translation: How am I lying? Don’t think you’re that unforgettable

lines.hanzi: 笑是真的不是我逞強
lines.pinyin: xiao shi zhen de bu shi wo cheng qiang
lines.translation: My smile is real—I’m not forcing it

lines.hanzi: 我好久沒來這間餐廳 沒想到已經換了裝潢
lines.pinyin: wo hao jiu mei lai zhe jian can ting mei xiang dao yi jing huan le zhuang huang
lines.translation: I haven’t been to this restaurant in a long time—I didn’t expect it to be renovated

lines.hanzi: 角落那窗口 聞得到玫瑰花香 被妳一說是有些印象
lines.pinyin: jiao luo na chuang kou wen de dao mei gui hua xiang bei ni yi shuo shi you xie yin xiang
lines.translation: That window in the corner—there’s a scent of roses; now that you mention it, it feels familiar

lines.hanzi: 我沒有說謊 我何必說謊
lines.pinyin: wo mei you shuo huang wo he bi shuo huang
lines.translation: I’m not lying—why would I lie?

lines.hanzi: 妳知道的 我缺點之一就是很健忘
lines.pinyin: ni zhi dao de wo que dian zhi yi jiu shi hen jian wang
lines.translation: You know one of my flaws is that I’m forgetful

lines.hanzi: 我哪有說謊 是很感謝今晚的相伴
lines.pinyin: wo na you shuo huang shi hen gan xie jin wan de xiang ban
lines.translation: How am I lying? I truly appreciate your company tonight

lines.hanzi: 但我竟然有些不習慣
lines.pinyin: dan wo jing ran you xie bu xi guan
lines.translation: But somehow, it feels a bit unfamiliar

lines.hanzi: 我沒有說謊 我何必說謊
lines.pinyin: wo mei you shuo huang wo he bi shuo huang
lines.translation: I’m not lying—why would I lie?

lines.hanzi: 愛一個人 沒愛到難道就會怎麼樣
lines.pinyin: ai yi ge ren mei ai dao nan dao jiu hui zen me yang
lines.translation: If you love someone but it doesn’t work out, what really happens?

lines.hanzi: 別說我說謊 人生已經如此的艱難
lines.pinyin: bie shuo wo shuo huang ren sheng yi jing ru ci de jian nan
lines.translation: Don’t say I’m lying—life is already hard enough

lines.hanzi: 有些事情就不要拆穿
lines.pinyin: you xie shi qing jiu bu yao chai chuan
lines.translation: Some things are better left unspoken

lines.hanzi: 我沒有說謊 是愛情說謊
lines.pinyin: wo mei you shuo huang shi ai qing shuo huang
lines.translation: I’m not lying—it’s love that lies

lines.hanzi: 它帶妳來 騙我說 渴望的有可能有希望
lines.pinyin: ta dai ni lai pian wo shuo ke wang de you ke neng you xi wang
lines.translation: It brought you to me, deceiving me into believing desire could become hope

lines.hanzi: 我沒有說謊 祝妳做個幸福的新娘
lines.pinyin: wo mei you shuo huang zhu ni zuo ge xing fu de xin niang
lines.translation: I’m not lying—I wish you to be a happy bride

lines.hanzi: 我的心事請妳就遺忘
lines.pinyin: wo de xin shi qing ni jiu yi wang
lines.translation: Please just forget what’s in my heart

texts.title: 说好不哭
texts.description: Jay Chou - Shuo hao bu ku

lines.hanzi: 沒有了聯絡 後來的生活
lines.pinyin: mei you le lian luo hou lai de sheng huo
lines.translation: After we lost contact, in the life that followed

lines.hanzi: 我都是聽別人說
lines.pinyin: wo dou shi ting bie ren shuo
lines.translation: I only heard about you from others

lines.hanzi: 說妳怎麼了 說妳怎麼過
lines.pinyin: shuo ni zen me le shuo ni zen me guo
lines.translation: They said how you were, how you’ve been living

lines.hanzi: 放不下的人是我
lines.pinyin: fang bu xia de ren shi wo
lines.translation: I’m the one who couldn’t let go

lines.hanzi: 人多的時候 就待在角落
lines.pinyin: ren duo de shi hou jiu dai zai jiao luo
lines.translation: When there are many people, I stay in the corner

lines.hanzi: 就怕別人問起我
lines.pinyin: jiu pa bie ren wen qi wo
lines.translation: Afraid others might ask about me

lines.hanzi: 你們怎麼了 妳低著頭
lines.pinyin: ni men zen me le ni di zhe tou
lines.translation: “What happened between you two?”—you lowered your head

lines.hanzi: 護著我連抱怨都沒有
lines.pinyin: hu zhe wo lian bao yuan dou mei you
lines.translation: Protecting me, without even complaining

lines.hanzi: 電話開始躲 從不對我說
lines.pinyin: dian hua kai shi duo cong bu dui wo shuo
lines.translation: You started avoiding my calls, never telling me why

lines.hanzi: 不習慣一個人生活
lines.pinyin: bu xi guan yi ge ren sheng huo
lines.translation: Not used to living alone

lines.hanzi: 離開我以後 要我好好過
lines.pinyin: li kai wo yi hou yao wo hao hao guo
lines.translation: After leaving me, you told me to live well

lines.hanzi: 怕打擾想自由的我
lines.pinyin: pa da rao xiang zi you de wo
lines.translation: Afraid of disturbing the me who wanted freedom

lines.hanzi: 都這個時候 妳還在意著
lines.pinyin: dou zhe ge shi hou ni hai zai yi zhe
lines.translation: Even at a time like this, you still care about

lines.hanzi: 別人是怎麼怎麼看我的
lines.pinyin: bie ren shi zen me zen me kan wo de
lines.translation: How others see me

lines.hanzi: 拼命解釋著 不是我的錯
lines.pinyin: pin ming jie shi zhe bu shi wo de cuo
lines.translation: Desperately explaining it wasn’t my fault

lines.hanzi: 是妳要走
lines.pinyin: shi ni yao zou
lines.translation: That you were the one who chose to leave

lines.hanzi: 眼看著妳難過
lines.pinyin: yan kan zhe ni nan guo
lines.translation: Watching you in pain

lines.hanzi: 挽留的話卻沒有說
lines.pinyin: wan liu de hua que mei you shuo
lines.translation: Yet I said nothing to make you stay

lines.hanzi: 妳會微笑放手
lines.pinyin: ni hui wei xiao fang shou
lines.translation: You would let go with a smile

lines.hanzi: 說好不哭讓我走
lines.pinyin: shuo hao bu ku rang wo zou
lines.translation: You promised not to cry and let me go

lines.hanzi: 妳什麼都沒有
lines.pinyin: ni shen me dou mei you
lines.translation: You had nothing

lines.hanzi: 卻還為我的夢加油
lines.pinyin: que hai wei wo de meng jia you
lines.translation: Yet you still cheered on my dreams

lines.hanzi: 心疼過了多久
lines.pinyin: xin teng guo le duo jiu
lines.translation: How long has this heartache lasted

lines.hanzi: 還在找理由等我
lines.pinyin: hai zai zhao li you deng wo
lines.translation: Still finding reasons to wait for me

lines.hanzi: 雨水追 進了窗
lines.pinyin: yu shui zhui jin le chuang
lines.translation: Rainwater chases its way into the window

lines.hanzi: 潮濕穿在心上
lines.pinyin: chao shi chuan zai xin shang
lines.translation: Dampness clings to my heart

lines.hanzi: 肆意生長 著流淌
lines.pinyin: si yi sheng zhang zhe liu tang
lines.translation: It grows wildly, flowing freely

lines.hanzi: 告訴我 要怎麼
lines.pinyin: gao su wo yao zen me
lines.translation: Tell me, how should I

lines.hanzi: 刻意的藏
lines.pinyin: ke yi de cang
lines.translation: Deliberately hide it

lines.hanzi: 它不曾說 淅瀝聲作回答
lines.pinyin: ta bu ceng shuo xi li sheng zuo hui da
lines.translation: It never speaks—the pattering sound answers instead

lines.hanzi: 在昏暗 的世界
lines.pinyin: zai hun an de shi jie
lines.translation: In this dim world

lines.hanzi: 慢慢的擦
lines.pinyin: man man de ca
lines.translation: Slowly wiping away

lines.hanzi: 雨劃破過後 留下的疤
lines.pinyin: yu hua po guo hou liu xia de ba
lines.translation: The scars left after the rain cuts through

lines.hanzi: 把自己 變成個
lines.pinyin: ba zi ji bian cheng ge
lines.translation: Turning myself into

lines.hanzi: 陌生人
lines.pinyin: mo sheng ren
lines.translation: A stranger

lines.hanzi: 哭過 就走
lines.pinyin: ku guo jiu zou
lines.translation: After crying, I just leave

lines.hanzi: 如果大雨落下
lines.pinyin: ru guo da yu luo xia
lines.translation: If the heavy rain falls

lines.hanzi: 就讓我 成為海洋
lines.pinyin: jiu rang wo cheng wei hai yang
lines.translation: Then let me become the ocean

lines.hanzi: 那些看似 束縛
lines.pinyin: na xie kan si shu fu
lines.translation: Those things that seem like restraints

lines.hanzi: 卻關於愛的
lines.pinyin: que guan yu ai de
lines.translation: Are actually about love

lines.hanzi: 每一朵浪花
lines.pinyin: mei yi duo lang hua
lines.translation: Every single wave

lines.hanzi: 如果大雨留下
lines.pinyin: ru guo da yu liu xia
lines.translation: If the heavy rain remains

lines.hanzi: 也許 忘了回家
lines.pinyin: ye xu wang le hui jia
lines.translation: Maybe I’ll forget to go home

lines.hanzi: 把雨穿在身上
lines.pinyin: ba yu chuan zai shen shang
lines.translation: Wearing the rain on my body

lines.hanzi: 然後去飛翔
lines.pinyin: ran hou qu fei xiang
lines.translation: And then go fly

lines.hanzi: 假裝是 翅膀
lines.pinyin: jia zhuang shi chi bang
lines.translation: Pretending it’s wings

lines.hanzi: 總有個你 讓我長大
lines.pinyin: zong you ge ni rang wo zhang da
lines.translation: There’s always someone like you who made me grow up

lines.hanzi: 轉身朝著你的方向
lines.pinyin: zhuan shen chao zhe ni de fang xiang
lines.translation: Turning toward your direction

lines.hanzi: 沒有任何牆能阻擋 這太陽
lines.pinyin: mei you ren he qiang neng zu dang zhe tai yang
lines.translation: No wall can block this sunlight

lines.hanzi: 如果大雨落下
lines.pinyin: ru guo da yu luo xia
lines.translation: If the heavy rain falls

lines.hanzi: 那我 成為海洋
lines.pinyin: na wo cheng wei hai yang
lines.translation: Then I’ll become the ocean

lines.hanzi: 披上你給的光
lines.pinyin: pi shang ni gei de guang
lines.translation: Wrapped in the light you gave me

lines.hanzi: 再一次飛翔
lines.pinyin: zai yi ci fei xiang
lines.translation: And fly once again

lines.hanzi: 長出了 翅膀
lines.pinyin: zhang chu le chi bang
lines.translation: Having grown wings
